name: attic-fanatics-dashboard
description: Attic Fanatics Funnel Analyzer — Full Stack

scripts.build: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && cd backend && npx prisma generate
scripts.start: cd backend && npx prisma db push && node prisma/seed-if-empty.js && node server.js
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && npx prisma migrate reset --force && node prisma/seed.js
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
